command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cp /home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json.last-good /home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json && openclaw doctor --fix 2>/dev/null; systemctl --user start openclaw-gateway && sleep 5 && systemctl --user is-active openclaw-gateway"
